---
title: "Clusters"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{dot}
//| fig-align: center
//| fig-width: 11
//| fig-height: 8

graph clusters {
  layout = neato
  normalize = true
  outputorder = edgesfirst
  bgcolor = transparent
  pad = 0.5

  node [
    shape = circle,
    fixedsize = true,
    width = 0.75,
    height = 0.75,
    style = filled,
    fillcolor = "white",
    color = "#8C1E1F",
    fontcolor = "#8C1E1F",
    penwidth = 2,
    fontsize = 11,
    target = "_top",
    class = "cluster-project"
  ]

  edge [
    color = "#8A9696",
    penwidth = 1.4
  ]

  p02 [
  label = "P02",
  URL = "subprojects/P02.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P02",
  pos = "0,3!"
]

p03 [
  label = "P03",
  URL = "subprojects/P03.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P03",
  pos = "1.9,2.3!"
]

p04 [
  label = "P04",
  URL = "subprojects/P04.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P04",
  pos = "3,0.5!"
]

p05 [
  label = "P05",
  URL = "subprojects/P05.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P05",
  pos = "2.6,-1.7!"
]

p06 [
  label = "P06",
  URL = "subprojects/P06.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P06",
  pos = "1.1,-3!"
]

p07 [
  label = "P07",
  URL = "subprojects/P07.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P07",
  pos = "-1.1,-3!"
]

p08 [
  label = "P08",
  URL = "subprojects/P08.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P08",
  pos = "-2.6,-1.7!"
]

p09 [
  label = "P09",
  URL = "subprojects/P09.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P09",
  pos = "-3,0.5!"
]

p10 [
  label = "P10",
  URL = "subprojects/P10.html",
  tooltip = "Open project P10",
  pos = "-1.9,2.3!"
]

  p02 -- p03
  p03 -- p04
  p04 -- p05
  p05 -- p06
  p06 -- p07
  p02 -- p10
  p10 -- p09
  p02 -- p06
  p09 -- p08

  // Romance collaboration edge
p07 -- p08 [
  class = "cluster-link",
  tooltip = "Open the Romance cluster"
]

// External Romance label
romance_label [
  shape = plain,
  fixedsize = false,
  pos = "-2.8,-3.1!",
  URL = "clusters/romance.html",
  tooltip = "Open the Romance cluster",
  target = "_top",
  class = "cluster-link",
  label = <
    <TABLE
      BORDER="0"
      CELLBORDER="1"
      CELLSPACING="0"
      CELLPADDING="6"
      WIDTH="75"
      COLOR="#8C1E1F"
      BGCOLOR="white"
    >
      <TR>
        <TD>
          <FONT COLOR="#8C1E1F"><B>ROMANCE</B></FONT>
        </TD>
      </TR>
    </TABLE>
  >
]

  p02 -- p08
  p07 -- p09
  p09 -- p06
  p06 -- p03
  p04 -- p09
  p04 -- p10
  p04 -- p07
  p05 -- p03
}
```
